title: Tender Herbal German Asparagus Risotto
description: A hearty and flavorful German-inspired risotto dish featuring tender asparagus and a hint of herbs. Perfect for a satisfying weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the chicken broth in a separate pot and keep warm. In a large skillet, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium heat. Add the Arborio rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the white wine to the skillet and cook until the liquid is almost completely absorbed, stirring constantly.

Add 1 cup of warmed chicken broth to the skillet and cook, stirring constantly, until the liquid is mostly absorbed. Repeat this process, adding the broth in 1/2 cup increments, until the rice is cooked and creamy.

While the rice is cooking, prepare the asparagus by trimming the ends and cutting into 1-inch pieces. In a separate pan, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium heat and add the asparagus. Cook for 3-4 minutes, or until tender.
Stir the chopped parsley and dill into the cooked rice. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
To serve, place a portion of the cooked rice on a plate and top with a portion of the tender asparagus.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley and dill if desired.
